name: phorcys420
html:
phorcys420
community creature @ coder
advanced benelogy consultant
css: .ph-wrap { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(160deg, #1a0033 0%, #3d0066 40%, #1a0033 100%); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-start; overflow: hidden; position: relative; box-sizing: border-box; } .ph-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 30%, rgba(255,20,147,0.18) 0%, transparent 65%); pointer-events: none; } .ph-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; text-align: center; padding: clamp(6px,2%,14px) clamp(4px,2%,10px) 0; } .ph-name { font-family: Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(1rem, 5vw, 1.9rem); font-weight: 900; color: #fff; text-shadow: 0 0 10px #ff69b4, 0 0 24px #ff1493; letter-spacing: 0.04em; animation: ph-float 3s ease-in-out infinite; } .ph-title { font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: clamp(0.45rem, 2.2vw, 0.75rem); color: #ffb6c1; text-shadow: 0 0 6px #ff69b4; letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-top: 2px; opacity: 0.92; } .ph-scene { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 42%; z-index: 3; } .ph-track { position: absolute; bottom: 8px; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 4px; background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, #888 0px, #888 14px, transparent 14px, transparent 22px); opacity: 0.7; } .ph-train { position: absolute; bottom: 12px; animation: ph-chug 6s linear infinite; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 2px; } .ph-engine { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; } .ph-body { width: clamp(36px,10vw,52px); height: clamp(18px,5vw,26px); background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ff69b4 0%, #c2185b 100%); border-radius: 4px 8px 2px 2px; position: relative; box-shadow: 0 0 8px #ff1493; } .ph-cab { width: clamp(18px,5vw,26px); height: clamp(12px,3.5vw,18px); background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ff9ec4 0%, #e91e8c 100%); border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0; margin-left: clamp(14px,4vw,20px); box-shadow: 0 0 6px #ff69b4; } .ph-chimney { position: absolute; top: clamp(-18px,-5vw,-10px); left: clamp(4px,1.2vw,7px); width: clamp(5px,1.5vw,8px); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } .ph-chimney::before { content: ''; display: block; width: clamp(5px,1.5vw,8px); height: clamp(10px,3vw,16px); background: #555; border-radius: 2px 2px 0 0; } .ph-smoke { position: absolute; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,182,193,0.7); animation: ph-smoke-up 1.8s ease-out infinite; } .ph-smoke.s1 { width: clamp(5px,1.5vw,8px); height: clamp(5px,1.5vw,8px); top: clamp(-22px,-6vw,-14px); animation-delay: 0s; } .ph-smoke.s2 { width: clamp(7px,2vw,11px); height: clamp(7px,2vw,11px); top: clamp(-30px,-8vw,-20px); animation-delay: 0.6s; opacity: 0.6; } .ph-smoke.s3 { width: clamp(9px,2.5vw,14px); height: clamp(9px,2.5vw,14px); top: clamp(-40px,-10vw,-28px); animation-delay: 1.2s; opacity: 0.35; } .ph-light { position: absolute; right: clamp(-6px,-1.5vw,-3px); top: 30%; width: clamp(5px,1.5vw,8px); height: clamp(5px,1.5vw,8px); background: #fffde0; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: 0 0 8px 4px rgba(255,253,200,0.7); } .ph-wheels { display: flex; gap: clamp(4px,1.2vw,8px); padding: 0 clamp(3px,1vw,6px); margin-top: 1px; } .ph-wheel { width: clamp(8px,2.2vw,13px); height: clamp(8px,2.2vw,13px); border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle, #ccc 30%, #555 100%); border: 1.5px solid #888; animation: ph-spin 0.6s linear infinite; } .ph-wheel.w-big { width: clamp(11px,3vw,17px); height: clamp(11px,3vw,17px); } .ph-car { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } .ph-car-body { width: clamp(30px,8.5vw,46px); height: clamp(16px,4.5vw,24px); background: linear-gradient(180deg, #e91e8c 0%, #880e4f 100%); border-radius: 3px 3px 2px 2px; box-shadow: 0 0 6px #ff69b4; position: relative; } .ph-car-windows { position: absolute; top: 3px; left: 0; width: 100%; display: flex; justify-content: space-evenly; } .ph-window { width: clamp(6px,1.8vw,10px); height: clamp(5px,1.5vw,8px); background: rgba(255,240,255,0.55); border-radius: 2px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3); } .ph-car-wheels { display: flex; gap: clamp(6px,1.8vw,12px); margin-top: 1px; } @keyframes ph-chug { 0% { left: 110%; } 100% { left: -60%; } } @keyframes ph-float { 0%,100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-5px); } } @keyframes ph-smoke-up { 0% { opacity: 0.8; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); } 100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(clamp(-18px,-5vw,-12px)) scale(1.6); } } @keyframes ph-spin { from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
